TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bird Averitt sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 7, Bird Averitt, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bird Averitt htagan beh sa Hopkinsville,Kentucky. sraral hiya ga mzyu mari maki Pepperdine Waves hopa pqwasan biru. Bird Averitt maki West Coast Conference,pspung magal blaq balay squliq na p'unro. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 12,Bird Averitt,wal mhuqil la.(68 kawas) kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βir* a*eritt s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βir* a*eritt, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βir* a*eritt ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ħopkins~ɕ*ille,kentuʦ~ʨkj. s~ɕraral ħija ɣa mzju mari maki pepper*ine wa*es~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. βir* a*eritt maki wes~ɕt ʦ~ʨoas~ɕt ʦ~ʨon*erenʦ~ʨe,ps~ɕpuŋ maɣal βlaq βalaj s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **,βir* a*eritt,wal mħuqil la.(** kawas~ɕ) kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Bird Averitt sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 7, Bird Averitt, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bird Averitt htagan beh sa Hopkinsville,Kentucky. sraral hiya ga mzyu mari maki Pepperdine Waves hopa pqwasan biru. Bird Averitt maki West Coast Conference,pspung magal blaq balay squliq na p'unro. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 12,Bird Averitt,wal mhuqil la.(68 kawas) kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βir* a*eritt s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βir* a*eritt, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βir* a*eritt ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ħopkins~ɕ*ille,kentuʦ~ʨkj. s~ɕraral ħija ɣa mzju mari maki pepper*ine wa*es~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. βir* a*eritt maki wes~ɕt ʦ~ʨoas~ɕt ʦ~ʨon*erenʦ~ʨe,ps~ɕpuŋ maɣal βlaq βalaj s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **,βir* a*eritt,wal mħuqil la.(** kawas~ɕ) kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
